name: Team Leader Fungicide research
description: Job Description: QUALIFICATIONS Advanced knowledge in organic chemical synthesis with a PhD in chemistry, medicinal chemistry or related o Postdoc and experience abroad, as w ell as in crop protection or pharmaceutical research are all an advantage but not essential o good English language skills o creativity, curiosity and enthusiasm to drive innovations o interpersonal and communication skills to develop innovative solutions in a diverse team RESPONSIBILITIES In our team Fungicide Chemistry you will work on the identification and development of highly effective, innovative chemical crop protection active ingredients designed to meet global market needs. From day one, you will join a diverse, international and multi-disciplinary team. You will be trained on the job and be supported by experts as well as other newer team members to address challenging and exciting scientific targets. o You will lead an organic synthesis laboratory team. o Your responsibilities will also include the design of active ingredients, their synthesis with a laboratory team, the analysis of their biological activity and the use of structure-activity relationships to initiate new designs. o You will drive multiparameter optimizations, applying medicinal chemistry concepts at the interface of fungi and plants. o With your work you will navigate at the frontiers of chemistry, modeling, biology, agronomy, regulatory and intellectual property. o You and your team will work with modern technologies and stay abreast of new developments (organic synthesis, drug discovery, competitor activities). You will network with academia, scientific partners and technology providers” Job Description Footer:

name: Executive - Production
description: Job Description: O bjecti v es of t h e P osi t ion Responsibility of Technical, Quality and cost-effective manufacturing of Dispersions Operations. It also involves plant and process safety, Health and Environmental activities related to the plant and personnel working in the plant. M ain Areas of Responsibilities and Key Activities Coordinate and manage production in shift with consistent quality as per the target. Continuous improvement of processes in coordination with the Head – Dispersions Plant & Quality control to reduce batch cycle times, increase in yields, increase operational ease and ultimately leading to cost effective production. Guiding a group of Officers / Operators in the plant continuously to ensure product quality of international standard. Implement Safety, Health and Environment system of the plant concerning man and equipment. Update knowledge regarding product through proper channel. Ensuring proper maintenance of all the norms as per the departmental operating procedures of ISO 9001 and ISO 14001. Act as incident/emergency controller   during the emergencies in shifts after office hours. Guide shop floor personnel towards SHE (Safety, Health and Environment) /Responsible care /cleanliness of the plant (5S) /discipline for improving the BASF’s safe work culture in the shifts. This ensures compliance of BASF’s statutory requirements, which also includes the training of the subordinates regarding the safety aspects and handling of the critical monomers /hazardous chemicals. Ensure that discharge parameters of all the emissions in the plant are within the statutory limits and health and hygiene of the plant personnel is well maintained. Adherence to the PPE usage of the plant personnel and work permit system is properly followed in the shifts. Training of the plant personnel on SHE / MSDS of the raw material, finished products and other plant related activities. Compliance to process safety and environmental protection code as per BASF Practice. Ensure the documentation of Responsible care requirement on continual basis Act as EHS representative in the shifts Job Requirements (m inimum requirement to carry out the work ) Edu c a t i o n : Bachelor’s in Chemical Engineering W o r k in g E x pe r i e n c e: 4-6 Years T e c hn i c a l & P r o f e ss i o n a l Knowledge: Chemical Process Job Description Footer:

name: Assistant Manager Production
description: Job Description: O bjecti v es of t h e P osi t ion: Lead Safety, Health and Environment at workplace. Coordinating and monitoring the production as per the decided norms, under the directions of Production Manager. To supervise and monitor planned production activities in respective shift through a team of workmen, operators and officers to ensure product is processed in time within specified instructions and standards. Ensuring smooth functioning of production plant by coordinating with required support and service functions. Coordinate with Production Manager to drive improvement projects Implement and Maintain 5S at Workplace Main Tasks: Related to Production Monitor Process flow, Capacity Utilization, Safety at workplace, Down times due to Breakdowns and Availability of Resources for achieving required productivity. Coordinate with production team and manage production with consistent quality as per the target. Continuous improvement of processes in coordination with the Process Manager & Production Manager to reduce batch cycle times, increase in yields, increase operational ease and ultimately leading to cost effective production. Related for EHS Responsible for safe operation of Dispersions plant in respective shift and act as a safety representative during shift work Contribute to improvement projects namely, 5S, OpEx along with the team. Provide necessary information / training to team members. Act as leading incident controller/emergency controller in case of emergency according to site incident management chart, after general shift working hours. Ensure safety performance of plant through following EHS practices, procedures defined for the plant. Analyze the gap in safety performance and provide relevant tools, resources to close the gap. Approve Hot Work / Height Work Permits in the absence of Plant Manager and his deputies. Maintain Safety, Health and Environment system in the plant concerning employees and equipment. Ensuring proper maintenance of all the norms as per the departmental operating procedures of ISO 9001, 14001 and 50001. Guide shop floor personnel towards EHS (Safety, Health and Environment) / Responsible Care / Cleanliness of the plant (5S) /discipline for improving the BASF’s safe work culture. This ensures compliance to statutory requirements, which also includes the training of the subordinates regarding the safety aspects and handling of equipment and hazardous chemicals. Ensure that discharge parameters of all the emissions in the plant are within the statutory limits Monitor adherence to the PPE usage among the plant personnel and follow work permit system is meticulously. Ensure trainings are imparted to company and contract employees according to schedule. Ensure the documentation of Responsible care and ISO management systems on continual basis. M ini m um E d u cation and Q u alifica t ion R e q ui r ed for t he P osition: Education:  Bachelor’s degree in chemical engineering 4- 6 years technical experience, plant / operations management / Team Leader Technical & Professional Knowledge: Good interpersonal, time management skills with ability to interact in a multiple hierarchical level. Continuous improvement techniques and methods including, overall asset effectiveness, Statistical techniques Distributed control system operations / Safety instrumented system functions (SIS) for enhanced safety of the operations. Job Description Footer:

Have hands-on experience with polyurethanes (CASE) processing equipment in High/low pressure foaming machine, Spray foaming, etc., would be highly advantageous. Good English and computer skills (MS 365). Job Description Footer:

Quality control Follow plant quality policy and product specifications, ensure to produce quality produce by following production procedures Follow daily inspections in shop floor to ensure high sustained quality product. Production records Raise relevant production records/statistics to Production Manager / Planner / Operations Leader in order to plan, set and update production schedules when necessary, regulate work flow to ensure maximum use of capacity and efficiency. Safety and housekeeping Follow corporate, company and statutory EHS requirements, implement the relevant safety and environment protection procedures Ensure that down the line personnel are following all company’s procedure including operations, safety and housekeeping guidelines to maintain a working environment that supports work safety and production activities. Maintenance of pipelines carrying effluent from plant to ETP Takeover the role of safety representative in the shifts. Implement the Responsible care requirement and guidelines on continual basis. Takeover the role of safety representative in the shifts. People management Conduct trainings to down the line personnel to update their production methods/skills, as and when required. Manage people in the shifts and ensure proper resources are available as per the safety guidelines What We Look For Engineering Graduate Chemical technology / Polymer or related More than 5 years of working experience in plant operation, preferably in a PU Polymer plant. Core competencies: Demonstrate customer focus, Act with entrepreneurial drive, Communicate Effectively Professional competencies: Work Management / Planning and Organizing, Safety, Health and Environment Awareness. Work Location Thane, India Job Description Footer:

name: Manager - Process Safety & Emergency Response
description: We are a leading chemical company, with the best teams developing intelligent solutions for our customers, and for a sustainable future. We connect and develop people with diverse talents all over the world. For you, this means a variety of ways to progress. Not only your performance but also your personality matter to us, regardless of gender, age, ethnicity, orientation, and background.  At BASF, careers develop from opportunities. Job Description: About The Role Be responsible to support service recipients in implementing BASF Group EHS requirements and guidance documents, to provide consultancy and support to fulfill legal and BASF requirements on process safety in India or in Asia Pacific countries if requested Act as a Process Safety expert to ensure high quality Safety, Health & Environment (SHE) Reviews for new capital investment projects and existing plant according to BASF Group EHS requirements and guidance documents Provide guidance in implementation of guidelines and programs through workshops and training, and monitoring implementation at the site by continuous reviews, assessments, and audits to achieve and continuously improve high standards of Process Safety performance Review Safety, Health & Environment (SHE) critical changes at the sites as part of MOC (Management of Changes) process, non-standard or new activities at the site level. How You Will Do It Process Safety Facilitate and coordinate SHE review process (SHE 0 to SHE 4 – Facility siting till Pre startup safety review) for new capital investment projects in India or in Asia Pacific region as requested according to the BASF Group EHS requirements and guidance documents using ICI HAZOP or equivalent techniques Facilitate and coordinate periodic hazard analysis (“Revalidation” and “Clean Sheet” SHE Reviews) for existing plants in India or as requested by regional office as per relevant mandatory requirements using ICI HAZOP or equivalent techniques Provide support to manufacturing sites/plants for preparation of BASF internal audit through questionnaire review, site inspections, documents review, measures for improvement and to follow up for closure of non-compliance Support Process Safety workshops/seminars and provide training to enhance sub region-wide competence in process safety for BASF in India as per the mandatory regional process safety training matrix Communicate & support the global process safety related issues or goals into practical programs and systems by providing implementation tools to service recipients in India . Support and coordinate the roll-out of such programs Act as competence center and advisor for process safety issues (e.g., explosion protection document preparation, guidance on internal and local requirements, safety review for critical changes at site as part of MOC process, non-standard or new activities at the site level) for BASF in India and other countries as requested by regional offices Communicate with Regional Competence Center for Process Safety for new BASF Internal directive, requirements and other Process Safety related projects and activities. Support sites in interpreting and implementing BASF process safety requirements Manage, lead, train and develop subordinates, Process Safety Coordinators, Plant Team members and Management of Change (MOC) Coordinators to build Process Safety related knowledge Oversee all process safety incidents of the country, support to service recipients for incident investigation processes, investigation of Process Safety incidents using root cause analysis methodology, recommend corrective measures and ensure completion of recommendations Consolidate & follow-up on status of action items of reviews Monitor the process safety performance, sharing of process safety incidents with all site colleagues in country as part of knowledge sharing Support Business Units, as requested, for assessment of vendors, suppliers, service providers from BASF EHS perspective Work towards achieving “Process Safety Expertise level 3” (a pool of highly competent process safety experts in BASF) for self in alignment and guidance from regional process safety group Emergency Response Advise, assist country management and Site Managers on Emergency Response Planning and Fire Prevention Requirements and Guidance Documents and support implementation. Review of Site / Plant Emergency Response Plans Conduct onsite/offsite mock drills and Desk–Top Exercises Support management and control of emergency response related to offsite transport incidents/accidents. Conduct Fire Prevention Inspection/Assessments at Sites/Plants as per COR R1 requirements, prepare report, recommend improvement action and follow-up review or closure of improvement actions Develop and ensure implementation of Crisis Management plan according to Regional Security Guidelines and standards Country Leadership Act as Country Responsible care (RC) Code Leader on Process Safety. Provide advisory and consultancy services to the sites and interface with regional office Implement country strategy in ensuring legal compliance, corporate conformance, and continuous improvement in own responsible care Process Safety code Be On-demand responsible care code services to Sites. Perform day-to-day consolidated functional responsible care code tasks Establish and maintain India responsible care code requirements What We Look For Graduate in Chemical Engineering (B.E/B.Tech-Chemical) (as minimum) Diploma in Industrial Safety would be additional advantage but not mandatory At least 10 years working experience in Chemical, Petrochemical production Plants or EHS area particularly in handling Process Safety of hazardous plants Must possess knowledge of Process Safety Knowledge of operating production plant(s) comprising various unit operations Demonstrated knowledge of common hazard assessment techniques is mandatory (e.g., ICI HAZOP or similar technique) Conduct process safety risk analysis, HAZOP (Hazard and Operability study) Well-developed conflict management skill to reach team consensus is mandatory. Proficient command of spoken and written English is mandatory Work Location Godrej One - Mumbai Job Description Footer:

name: Talent Community
description: Job Description: WELCOME TO BASF At BASF Digital Hub Hyderabad, we’re shaping the future of the chemical industry through innovation, creativity, and collaboration. As we continue to grow, we’re building a talent pipeline for IT Professionals who want to make a difference. WHY JOIN OUR TALENT COMMUNITY? We are continuously building a community of forward‑thinking professionals who are passionate about technology, innovation, and impactful problem‑solving. We are opening positions across a variety of technical domains, and we’re always excited to connect with individuals who bring curiosity, adaptability, and a strong desire to grow. As part of our talent community, you may be considered for future opportunities in areas such as software engineering, data science, cloud engineering, ERPs (SAP, ServiceNow, etc), cybersecurity, Artificial Intelligence, RPA automation, and platform operations. If you thrive in environments where continuous learning and collaboration are part of everyday life, apply here. WHAT WE OFFER A secure work environment because your health, safety and wellbeing is always our top priority Learning and development opportunities A collaborative, trustful and innovative work environment Being part of an international team and work in global projects Diversity is our greatest strength! Become a part of our winning formula for success and develop the future with us - in a global team that embraces inclusion and equal opportunities irrespective of gender, age, origin, sexual orientation, disability or belief. Job Description Footer:

name: Production Executive
description: We are a leading chemical company, with the best teams developing intelligent solutions for our customers, and for a sustainable future. We connect and develop people with diverse talents all over the world. For you, this means a variety of ways to progress. Not only your performance but also your personality matter to us, regardless of gender, age, ethnicity, orientation, and background.  At BASF, careers develop from opportunities. Job Description: Objectives of the Position: As a designated Shift Supervisor, takes responsibility of Safety, Production, Quality of System House plant in the shifts. Main Tasks: Coordinate and manage production in shift with consistent Quality and Safety as per the target. Manage the manpower planning in the shift. (Employee and Contractor) Continuous improvement of processes in coordination with the Plant Manager and his Deputy & Quality control to reduce batch cycle times, increase in yields, increase operational ease and ultimately leading to cost effective production. Whenever required, Coordinate with Supply chain and logistics team for adherence of production schedule and share the information to the team of change if any. Guiding a group of Operators in the plant continuously to ensure consistent product quality and safety. Implement Safety, Health and Environment system of the plant concerning man and equipment. Update knowledge and share the information of any change through proper channel. Ensure that discharge parameters of all the emissions in the plant are within the statutory limits and health and hygiene of the plant personnel is well maintained in the shifts. Ensuring proper implementation of norms as per the departmental operating procedures of ISO 9001, ISO 14001 & ISO 50001 Energy Management system. Guide shop floor personnel towards SHE (Safety, Health and Environment) /(RC)Responsible care /cleanliness of the plant (5S) /discipline for improving the BASF’s safe work culture in the shifts. This ensures compliance of BASF’s statutory requirements, which also includes the training of the subordinates regarding the safety aspects and handling of the critical hazardous chemicals. Ensuring compliance to TDS requirements while performing activities like tanker loading, Tanker unloading, labelling and packing as and when required. Adherence to the PPE usage by self and plant personnel, ensure work permit system is properly followed in the shifts. Adherence to target agreement and perform additional responsibilities as per given timeline Prepare and share production reports to higher management. Co-ordinate with site functions like Warehouse, Engineering , WWTP, Admin and Quality team. Compliance to process safety and environmental protection code as per BASF Practice. Ensure the documentation of Responsible care requirement on continual basis. Act as EHS representative in the shifts. As a Part of ERT(Emergency Response Team), rush to the incident spot in case of emergency in the site. For emergency in System House plant, take a lead and coordinate with incident controller. Requirements: Bachelor of Science/ Diploma 4 - 5 years of experience in the relevant industry. Technical & Professional Knowledge: Chemical Process and relevant experience. Job Description Footer:

name: Technical Service Lab Executive
description: We are a leading chemical company, with the best teams developing intelligent solutions for our customers, and for a sustainable future. Job Description: About The Role We are seeking a detail-oriented and proactive Technical Service Lab Executive to join our laboratory team. The ideal candidate will support product testing, customer complaint analysis, formulation support, and technical service activities. This role involves hands-on lab work, data interpretation, and collaboration with cross-functional teams including sales, production, and quality. How You Will Do It Conduct routine and non-routine laboratory analyses on raw materials, intermediates, and finished products. Support technical service requests by performing application studies, product evaluations, and performance testing. Assist in troubleshooting customer issues and providing analytical reports and recommendations. Develop and optimize test methods, formulations, and application procedures as required. Maintain accurate documentation of experiments, test results, calibration logs, and lab reports. Ensure compliance with lab safety practices, ISO standards, and internal SOPs. Handle laboratory instruments such as GC, HPLC, UV-Vis, FTIR, viscometers, titrators, pH meters, etc. (Exposure preferred; training will be provided for freshers.) Prepare technical presentations, data summaries, and customer documentation when required. What We Look For Education: B.Tech / M.Sc in Chemistry, Industrial Chemistry, Applied Chemistry, Polymer Science, Chemical Engineering. Experience: 1–5 years in technical service, R&D, QC/QA, or application labs in chemical, polymer, coatings, adhesives, specialty chemicals, or related industries. 1–5 years of experience in Super Absorbent Polymer (SAP) [Must Have] Strong understanding of analytical chemistry, organic chemistry, or polymer chemistry concepts. Hands-on laboratory skills with good attention to detail. Ability to analyze data and interpret results accurately. Good communication skills for interacting with internal teams and customers. Problem-solving mindset with a willingness to learn and adapt. Organized, disciplined, and able to manage multiple tasks simultaneously. Work Location Innovation Campus Mumbai Job Description Footer:

name: Site Controller
description: We are a leading chemical company, with the best teams developing intelligent solutions for our customers, and for a sustainable future. Job Description: Objectives of the Position: This position is required to guide, challenge and advise the organization towards economic decision-making and value generation. Ensure that financial practices align with the overall corporate strategy while also adhering to local regulations and standards. Enforce compliance with financial policies and procedures. To facilitate the site management in steering the business and evaluating the costs in the legal entity. Develops financial competencies, partnering with key site functions and business, systems and reports to help improve performance, in respect of rules & standards to ensure full compliance. This position will be based in Thane and Vikhroli - incumbent is required to travel between these two lcoations as and when required. Main Areas of Responsibilities and Key Activities: Prepare Business Reports (Site Management inclusive) and maintain BASF Applications: Prepare and present accurate financial statements and reports to senior management. Monitor and ensure compliance with accounting principles and standards Reports prepared punctually and accurately Key Performance Indicators (KPIs): Product Costing report Sales Performance Overview: Role as variant BASF application gate keeper on site, e.g. Contract Management Database, COINS (Cost Consolidated Reporting and Analysis), I-Comp (ICTP), MARIS, Ocean, CARAT, SCII, etc. Support Site CAPEX  / OpEx (Small Investment or potential regional/global project): Manage annual Small Investment Planning Analyze Small Investment cost development, number of CAPEX and make sure budget under control. Manage potential regional or global project(s) planning taking place, in alignment with regional / global counterparts. Setup and on-going support to project Application and closing, for example project capital injection, project tax refund coordination, project equipment custom duty-free register, etc. Deliver relevant training, build up site team knowledge on Finance. Supervise BU/FU/Company Operational Planning, Business Analysis: Manage OMP operational planning process, cost budget and production planning in alignment with the region Ensure that standard costing is done in compliance with BASF accounting guidelines Definition, target setting and monitoring of KPIs in the site organization Monthly report fixed cost, variable cost and cost of sales comparison BGT/ACT/FC and information to management Monitor and report operation result of Manufacturing, Maintenance, Infrastructures, WWTP & utilities. Support various stock taking in the site organization Set up company level VBM and KPI and work with plant managers on constant improvement in plant costs Monthly monitoring to ensure performance under control. Implement and monitor cost control measures to enhance profitability and operational efficiency. Analyze cost structures and recommend cost-saving initiatives. Review and approve all site-related expenditures, ensuring alignment with budgetary constraints. Constantly seeking improvement in processes to increase efficiency and effectiveness Responsible for OMP Manufacturing Cost and Allocation Key Analysis: Monitor Process Order settlement rate and close the order in urgent case. Monitor/analyze company manufacturing cost development (e.g. utilities, infrastructure, wastewater, indirect service charge, direct cost, etc.). Monitoring BOM, Recipes, Business Process to make sure Process order properly operated Cross BU/plant cost allocation agreement for shared costs (idle cost, cost difference, etc.) Monitor material price (e.g. PUP price, standard price, make investigation on significant price fluctuation, etc.) Check SAP cost estimate before month end costing run. Site all cost centre gate keeper including cost set up and allocation key update. Support OpEx (Operational Excellence Measures) by validating and challenging benefits provided by site managers for OpEx Compliance and Risk Management: Ensure compliance with local, state, and federal financial regulations and laws. Identify financial risks and implement appropriate risk mitigation strategies. Liaise with external auditors during financial audits. Coordinate both internal and external audits (e.g. CEQ, Project audit A/W, operation audit, FRC audit, KPMG, FX, Tax, Customs, Supplier auditor, including follow up case) Advises Site colleagues on compliance matters Teamwork and Interface Management: Teamwork with other related teams, i.e. SAP team, logistic team. R&D team, maintenance team. To execute as LBM representative on assignments to ensure alignment among regional and local stakeholders to fulfil business objectives Business Support to Development Lab: Support the PU Development Lab with regards to accounting and financial matters including payments, sale of scrap, allocations, process setup Manage operational planning process of Lab, cost budget and monitor costs, recommend cost- saving initiatives, improve efficiency and effectiveness Manage annual capex plan and make sure no budget variance Deliver relevant training, build up site team knowledge on Finance. Projects and Back-up: Be a back-up for other PM site controllers as and when required. Active participation and engage with other Site controllers to share best practices. Lead and participate in ad-hoc projects locally or for the region Fixed Cost planning, forecasting and monitoring for APMA- India Requirements: CA degree in Finance or Accounting Around 5 years working experience in international manufacturing company in manufacturing environment Strong cost accounting and financial analysis capabilities, project management and transversal relations skills Proficient in English communication Job Description Footer:

Coordinate on incident reporting with stake holders, e.g. offices, sites, farms to ensure timely and 100% incident reporting. Performs day-to-day consolidated functional RC code tasks. Establishes and maintain country RC code requirements. What We Look For Education: bachelor’s degree in chemical engineering or master’s degree in science Diploma in Safety would be an additional advantage. Working Experience: At least 10~15 years working experience in production, engineering or EHS English Proficiency: Level 3 Technical & Professional Knowledge:  Excellent communication and management skill, familiar with local legislation system and legal requirements in EHS. Must have good understanding of scope and function of EHS units. Work Location Godrej One - Mumbai Job Description Footer:

Job Description: About The Role Develop and implement the sales activities to realize the mid and long-term objectives of the plastic additives business both Up Stream (Polymer Manufacturer) and Down Stream (Converter/ Compounder/ Masterbatcher) in India How Will You Do It Sales development: Develop sales plan and execute towards volume and margin growth Prospect, secure and expedite orders with existing and new accounts Conclude business contracts (sales, distribution, etc.) to maintain business growth Develop new markets, customers and new applications Attend to the customer complaints and provide measures to resolve them Prepare customer visits and other reports Market intelligence: Conduct studies/analysis on market trend, competitors, products’ applications and technology, service needs and initiate appropriate action plan Carry out market research project to develop competitor grid and benchmarking analyses Prepare market, industry trends, competitors, customers’ reports on a regular basis Customer & distributor management: Maintain existing customers / account plans and improve business relationships Manage key accounts and distributors Conduct field visits, seminars, presentation and attend to customer’s inquiries Provide prompt response related to quality, technical applications, inquiries, and other related issues Cooperate with functional team to ensure best product, service quality and good information flow and solve customer’s issues Inventory management Provide data and timely feedback on end use market trends, and monthly sale forecast, to support defining and revising the levels of regional stock and allocation Product and application: Conduct sales presentation, workshop, trade road show to promote products and their applications Arrange product testing and trial runs Credit management: Ensure timely payment of receivables to meet established sales targets and revenue goals Coordinate with credit control to make appropriate credit recommendation Others Prepare sales performance report, and other relevant reports as assigned Perform such other duties, which may be assigned by the supervisor from time to time What Are We Looking For Bachelor’s Degree, preferably in Polymer Chemistry or Chemical Engineering Min 5 years experience in a sales or commercial role preferably in plastic  industries Business development experience is an advantage Good understanding of plastic additives and their applications; plastics market and plastics value chain Work Location Godrej One - Mumbai Job Description Footer:

name: Process engineer
description: We are a leading chemical company, with the best teams developing intelligent solutions for our customers, and for a sustainable future. We connect and develop people with diverse talents all over the world. For you, this means a variety of ways to progress. Not only your performance but also your personality matter to us, regardless of gender, age, ethnicity, orientation, and background.  At BASF, careers develop from opportunities. Job Description: About The Role Provide support to process engineering and technology transfer topics in India Prepare a comprehensive engineering package for process development and scale-up topics in India pertaining to batch processes Continuously support the production to optimize plant performance and output Support process engineering research lab development activities and innovation activities for OD-specific needs How Will You Do It Act as the “Focal point” of process engineering research in India to connect with ODs and expert teams globally, to provide solutions accordingly by leveraging process engineering expertise & resources Self-dependent execution, or participation of complex research and operation support projects that requires specific expertise in process engineering Provide continuous support to the lab scale process development activities and develop a strategy for the scale-up based on the process requirements and constraints Build-up stronger competencies downstream unit operations for batch processes (distillation, filtration, crystallization, drying etc.) in India to bridge the gap between lab and production scale Closely work with the ODs and external contract manufacturing partners to develop a process package for effective tech transfer and operational ease Provide continuous support for troubleshooting, operational issues and process optimization during and after the tech transfer Identify and evaluate new contract manufacturing partners for various applications from different ODs in India Independently identify and execute topics focusing on operation cost reduction for plants Critically evaluate and interpret the process data to give recommendations about improvements Comprehensively develop technical concepts for new processes, including mass balance, PFD, simulations, engineering calculations and design of equipment Strictly follow the legal, information protection and EHS compliance regulations What Are We Looking For Edu c a t i o n: Masters in Chemical Engineering or related W o r k in g Experience 1-5 years experience in the domain of process engineering and/or batch processes and/or technology transfer, process scale-up, process development and optimization for downstream operations. T e c hn i c a l & Professional Knowledge: Experience with process simulation and modelling of distillation units, heat exchangers, filters, crystallizers etc. Experience of working on process development, technology transfer and scale-up topics is desirable. Experience of building up lab capabilities for process development and optimization. Communication: Proactive, open, and self-motivated, ability or potential to handle multi-interface communication. English: Be able to use English as work language; German will also be desirable. Proficient in process simulation software; skillful in standard applications such as MS Office; familiar with plant data collection system and analysis Work Location Navi Mumbai - HO (Innovation Campus) Job Description Footer:

name: Assistant Sales Manager, Pharma Solutions
description: We are a leading chemical company, with the best teams developing intelligent solutions for our customers, and for a sustainable future. We connect and develop people with diverse talents all over the world. For you, this means a variety of ways to progress. Not only your performance but also your personality matter to us, regardless of gender, age, ethnicity, orientation, and background.  At BASF, careers develop from opportunities. Job Description: About The Role Drive sales Growth: Plan sales strategy in order to achieve agreed sales target and grow sustainably in the defined territory. Find opportunities: Develop project pipeline with customers, business partners and through partnerships with technical team Close profitable deals Market Research to cover trends, regulation, competitor and growth opportunities How You Will Do It Strategic: Strategy Development, conceptualization and implementation: contribute to the development and drive the execution of the Pharma Solutions strategy. Specific responsibilities include annual and short-termed sales plans, business and market development, market research and planning, strategic direction for local promotion, and partnering with other related management teams, e.g. customer service, supply chain, product management, marketing. Operational: Perform all sales driven activities for Pharma Solutions in the assigned territory Support business growth: Apply the overall sales process, aiming to meet or exceed sales related targets (e.g. volume, cCM1 and net sales, cost, DIV, DSO). Close deals to maximize cCM1. Be responsibile for Planning & Forecasting: Provide accurate sales forecast, supporting efficient planning of products and services. Close coordination with sub regional planner to ensure adequate stocking for the customers in the territory Manage Accounts: Develop lasting customer relationships to identify business trends. Key Account management of defined customers by ensuring that there is defined and documented account plans, distribution evaluation tool, customer specific business and / or technical solutions Drive growth through effective Distribution Management Manage business Development: Develop customer portfolio to grow net sales and profit. Discover and drive opportunities at customers. Strengthen opportunity finding, increase opportunity pipeline value and drive growth opportunities through effective sales pipeline management in close collaboration with the technical service team. Execute of Sales Excellence (Effectiveness of sales), pricing through CPQ, Sales Force usage and BRM compliance. Perform additional Sales related activities in close collaboration with SCM and CSO community to ensure smooth order processing and removing of potential order blocks. Actively contribute to fill innovation pipeline based on interaction and feedback from customers as well as market knowledge. Manage reports – provide regular reports on sales and allied activities as per the requirement What We Look For University degree, minimum Bachelor Degree in Pharmaceutical or Chemical or Science related major, ideally additional MBA Degree. Minimum 5-7 years total professional experience of which at least 5 years in sales related job.  Pharma & Excipients. At least 4 years experiences in commercial roles in pharma business or related industries with a proven track record of developing business. Knowledge in handling technical matters and commercial transactions; knowledge and / or skills in pharmaceutical technology and operations; being familiar with pharma related quality standards (GMP) preferable; ideally, experience in key account management. Fluent English speaking and writing, business acumen, strong interpersonal skills, negotiation skills, hunting spirit, strategic and conceptional thinking, conflict management. Work Location Godrej One - Mumbai or Hyderabad Job Description Footer:

Not only your performance but also your personality matter to us, regardless of gender, age, ethnicity, orientation, and background.  At BASF, careers develop from opportunities. Job Description: We are seeking a Frontend Engineer (JavaScript / React) to design and build intuitive, high-quality user interfaces for our applications. In this role, you will be responsible for developing responsive and maintainable frontend solutions, working closely with backend engineers, designers, and other stakeholders to deliver cohesive and user-focused products. Main Tasks: Develop and maintain modern web applications using JavaScript and React Build reusable, well-structured, and maintainable UI components Collaborate with backend engineers to integrate APIs and services Translate design concepts into functional, high-quality user interfaces Ensure performance, accessibility, and cross-browser compatibility Contribute to frontend architecture and best practices Participate in code reviews and collaborative development processes Support testing, debugging, and continuous improvement of frontend applications Requirements: B.E. / B. Tech in Computer Science / Software Engineering / Information Technology, MCA or an equivalent degree Candidates with minimum of 4 years of relevant experience in the above-mentioned technologies Strong experience with JavaScript (ES6+) and React Solid understanding of modern frontend development practices Experience with state management approaches (e.g., Redux, Context API) Proficiency in HTML5, CSS3, and responsive design principles Experience integrating RESTful APIs or similar services Familiarity with GIT and collaborative development workflows Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail Ability to work effectively in a team-oriented environment Experience with TypeScript Familiarity with modern frontend tooling (e.g., Vite, Webpack) Experience with testing frameworks (e.g., Jest, React Testing Library) Understanding of UI/UX principles Experience working in agile development environments Exposure to design systems or component libraries Job Description Footer:

description:

We believe the right path is through creativity, trial and error and great people working and learning together. Become part of our team and develop the future with us - in a global team that embraces diversity and equal opportunities. Objective of the position Describe your Product Mission here / objective of the role: At our unit “Data Foundation - Big Data Management” we aim to offer organizations a robust and scalable solution for managing and deriving insights from vast quantities of data. By utilizing Azure's PaaS components, our platform streamlines the deployment and handling of Big Data workloads, empowering our clients to make data-driven decisions and propel business expansion. Our team is accountable for the creation and upkeep of the Big Data platform built on Azure PaaS components EDL (Enterprise Data Lake). We collaborate intensively with stakeholders to comprehend their needs and devise solutions that fulfill their expectations. The team is also in charge of guaranteeing the platform's scalability, dependability, and security, and for staying abreast with the newest technologies and trends in the big data domain About the Job: We are seeking a highly motivated and detail-oriented candidate who will be responsible for all data engineering aspects of the data product layer of our Enterprise Datalake, working with Azure and Databricks, maintaining/developing our framework and CI/CD pipelines and processes in an ambitious team. Main Task Develop, extend and optimize the data product layer of our Enterprise Datalake with high code standards, tests and suitable documentation to meet both user and internal needs. Collaborate with the product owner and architect to understand data requirements and provide suitable solutions. Troubleshoot data and software related issues and optimize pipelines for performance and scalability. Work with Azure Databricks, Azure Data Factory/Synapse keeping up to date with the latest features and suggest their implementation if beneficial. Demonstrate fluent communication skills in English (spoken and written) Job Requirements T e c hn i c a l & P r o f e ss i o n a l Knowledge (mandatory) Experienc e in Agile way of working with a DevOps mindset In-depth know how with Lakehouse concepts , Databricks and Unity Catalog . Strong data engineering and development skills to maintain and extend the data product layer of our datalake Strong knowledge in automation & scripting with tools like Github actions , Azure DevOps pipelines, Azure Data Factory, etc. T e c hn i c a l & P r o f e ss i o n a l Knowledge ( additional plus/nice to have skills) Experience with Azure Datafactory /Synapse data flows and pipelines, which are the basis of a legacy application for data products Ideally, automating code generation and code management with the help of AI tools PowerBI as one of the main tools of our users Integration knowledge , how metadata can be exchanged with other applications via API s e.g. with Colibra datacatalog or an inhouse solution for data product definition Ideally, backed up by vendor certifications (e.g. Microsoft, Databricks ). Team player with strong interpersonal, written, and verbal communication skills Edu c a t i o n Bachelor's degree in computer science, Information Technology, Engineering, Business, or related fields. Work experience Minimum 7-8 years related working experience as a Dataengineer using Azure, Databricks, Python, Azure Data Factory or Synapse WHAT WE OFFER Be part of a global leader in digital transformation, working in a vibrant Digital Hub that values innovation, agility, and cross-functional collaboration. Shape the future of BASF’s digital landscape, contributing to projects that drive sustainability and make a real impact. Thrive in a high-performance culture that supports your personal and professional growth, offering diverse learning opportunities and career development. Enjoy a modern, inclusive work environment where your ideas are valued, and your curiosity and ambition are encouraged. Benefit from flexible working models, international networking, and a strong sense of purpose as we enable our customers’ green transformation and lead the way in digital excellence. We believe the right path is through creativity, trial and error and great people working and learning together. Become part of our team and develop the future with us - in a global team that embraces diversity and equal opportunities. Your main responsibilities include: - You are responsible for designing, implementing, and supporting OMP related developments using OPAL. Build and deploy the templates using GIT version control system. Experience in implementing pyramids/solvers/conflicts in OPAL programming language. Understanding in software development lifecycle including automated testing and working on the development and operational topics Skills in programming language python, Java, C++ Education :- Bachelor’s or master’s degree in supply chain management, Information Technology, Industrial Engineering, Software Engineering, or Computer Science or a related field. Excellent communication skills in English. Experience in development or IT consulting with focus on supply chain planning solutions. Excellent communication skills in English. In-depth knowledge around planning solutions in Detailed Planning & Scheduling, SAP ECC, SAP APO and OMP. SC planning process knowledge. Nice to have :- ERP knowledge in the area of manufacturing. Experience with agile development methods like Scrum. Agile Certification(s) from Scrum Alliance, or SAFe (or others). Experience with LeanUX, Design Thinking Knowledge of Atlassian tools such as Jira, Confluence Experience :- - SC Planning experience for 2-5 years (e.g. Demand Planning, Supply Network Planning, Detailed Scheduling, Optimization, Data Integration) - Technical affinity - Takeover development tasks and implement changes Knowledge/Skills :- Open mindset Openness to new trends and innovative solutions. Willingness to learn and adopt into new planning tools The will and ability to drive change to achieve business goals. Ability to work in a multicultural team spread across the globe Start a training path to OMP, Rollout of OMP as a replacement of SAP APO Learning by doing / shadowing a colleague. Actively pull and take over tasks and work self-organized WHAT WE OFFER Be part of a global leader in digital transformation, working in a vibrant Digital Hub that values innovation, agility, and cross-functional collaboration. Shape the future of BASF’s digital landscape, contributing to projects that drive sustainability and make a real impact. Thrive in a high-performance culture that supports your personal and professional growth, offering diverse learning opportunities and career development. Enjoy a modern, inclusive work environment where your ideas are valued, and your curiosity and ambition are encouraged. Benefit from flexible working models, international networking, and a strong sense of purpose as we enable our customers’ green transformation and lead the way in digital excellence. description:

We believe the right path is through creativity, trial and error and great people working and learning together. Become part of our team and develop the future with us - in a global team that embraces diversity and equal opportunities. Objective of the position We are looking for a highly dynamic, motivated, and collaborative person to join our team. We are focused on the modernization of legacy systems and development of new capabilities of digital solutions in the Operations Platform team. There is a growing global need within BASF to leverage digitalization to continue BASF’s journey of excellence and continuously improving our capabilities especially through digitalization. In this role, you will work alongside a global development team to create and iteratively improve upon a global, internal full stack development solution with a focus on an open source stack and a cloud-based platform. Main Task Own end-to-end delivery of product features (frontend, backend, integration) from discovery through production support. Lead solution design and architecture (APIs, service boundaries, data models), ensuring scalability, maintainability, and security. Translate business needs into technical requirements; proactively manage trade-offs (scope, performance, cost, time) with stakeholders. Set and uphold engineering standards: code reviews, automated testing strategy, performance benchmarking, and secure coding practices. Leverage AI-assisted engineering responsibly (e.g., copilots/LLMs) to improve delivery and quality; evaluate and integrate AI capabilities where valuable, ensuring data privacy, security, and model governance. Design and improve CI/CD pipelines and release processes; drive infrastructure-as-code and environment standardization. Own production readiness: observability (logs/metrics/traces), on-call/incident response support, root-cause analysis, and continuous improvement. Drive modernization of legacy components (refactoring, migration, deprecation) and actively manage technical debt with a clear roadmap. Mentor engineers through pairing, coaching, and design/code reviews; contribute to hiring, onboarding, and knowledge sharing. Create and maintain technical documentation (architecture decisions, runbooks, API contracts) and ensure compliance with internal security and quality policies. Job Requirements T e c hn i c a l & P r o f e ss i o n a l Knowledge (mandatory) Advanced Angular and TypeScript. Microfrontend architecture M onorepo setup (module federation or similar), shared libraries, versioning, and dependency management. Strong Java and Spring Boot expertise (REST APIs, security, data access, testing). Cloud-native application development (containers, scalable deployments, configuration/secrets, resilience, cost awareness). Practical AI understanding for software teams (AI-assisted development and/or building AI-enabled features), including data privacy, security, and responsible use. Proven technical leadership: driving architecture decisions, mentoring, and collaborating effectively across product, UX, and platform teams. T e c hn i c a l & P r o f e ss i o n a l Knowledge ( additional plus/nice to have skills) Azure DevOps (Repos, Pipelines, Boards) and CI/CD automation for Angular + Java/Spring Boot stacks. Experience working with international, distributed teams (cross- timezone collaboration, communication, and stakeholder management). Infrastructure-as-code and platform exposure (e.g., Terraform/Bicep, Kubernetes, API gateways, message brokers, caches). A I-enabled application patterns (e.g., RAG, vector search, prompt evaluation, guardrails) and integrating with model endpoints. Edu c a t i o n Degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, informatics, business informatics or in a comparable field Work experience More than 5 + years in a senior developer role for a large team WHAT WE OFFER Be part of a global leader in digital transformation, working in a vibrant Digital Hub that values innovation, agility, and cross-functional collaboration. Shape the future of BASF’s digital landscape, contributing to projects that drive sustainability and make a real impact. Thrive in a high-performance culture that supports your personal and professional growth, offering diverse learning opportunities and career development. Enjoy a modern, inclusive work environment where your ideas are valued, and your curiosity and ambition are encouraged. Benefit from flexible working models, international networking, and a strong sense of purpose as we enable our customers’ green transformation and lead the way in digital excellence. description:

Come join us and be a part of our digitalization journey. Objective of the position We are looking for a highly dynamic, motivated, and collaborative person to join our team. We are focused on the modernization of legacy systems and development of new capabilities of digital solutions in the Operational EHS domain. There is a growing global need within BASF to leverage digitalization to continue BASF’s journey of EHS excellence and continuously improving our capabilities especially through digitalization. In this role, you will work alongside a global development team to create and iteratively improve upon a global, internal full stack development solution for the occupational safety domain with a focus on an open source stack and a cloud-based platform. Main tasks As a test automation engineer for the Operational EHS Platform and Integration team, you will be part of a global, multidisciplinary team responsible for the development of an internal platform for daily use globally at BASF production facilities. You will develop programs that will test the accuracy and reliability of internally developed software solutions for each module during its initial development and on an ongoing basis, especially in advance of major updates/deployments. Drive automation coverage and quality for your modules (prioritization, maintainability, and reducing flaky tests). You will collaborate with members of the Operational EHS Solutions team to define test cases and ensure testing is comprehensive and accurate You will provide feedback to the full-stack developer team and provide recommendations for corrective approaches for any issues identified during the testing process. Own the test approach for your assigned modules, aligned with the globally defined strategy. Job Requirements minimum requirement to carry out the work – you might want to point out “additional plus/nice to have skills” that are not mandatory Edu c a t i o n Degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, informatics, business informatics or in a comparable field Work experience More than 5 + years as QA Automator for a large team More than 5 + years as Manual QA for a large team T e c hn i c a l & P r o f e ss i o n a l Knowledge (mandatory) Experience in development and testing, with programming skills in JavaScript Experience in test automation UI / API test development, utilizing design patterns and automation framework such as Playwright, Selenium or similar . Experience in Manual testing and exploratory testing Solid understanding of QA methodologies Improve delivery speed by preventing defects and reducing rework through early testing and automation The ability to predict common user workflows in order to design effective tests. Experience in test design, performance testing, and configuration management T e c hn i c a l & P r o f e ss i o n a l Knowledge ( additional plus/nice to have skills) ISTQB Certifications Load testing knowledge (Locust, Jmeter , etc) Excellent issue isolation, troubleshooting, and debugging skills. BPI is considered a strategic tool to digitalize processes and enable seamless exchange of data between applications, businesses, customers and partners in real-time. Describe the objectives of the role here (2 - 3 sentences only) In this role, you will focus on consulting representatives of BASF businesses and BASF partners on integrating business processes primarily in the Purchase-to-Pay process area, including respective mappings. Main Tasks / Scope of Work The Solution Consultant provides customized integration solutions for internal partners and external partners via EDI, API, Micro Services, AI Agents, and similar technologies. The Solution Consultant supports our internal (SAP ERP and Satellite Systems) and external partners to specify their requirements and translates those into best-in-class solution designs based on technical and business process knowledge, aligned with process design and architecture. The consultant will be responsible for supplemental tasks in the daily operation, e.g. operational support (2nd/3rd level), issue resolving, quality assurance, and business interaction. The role does also include assignments to support comprehensive business integration projects. The Solution Consultant works in a global, international setting, interacting with team members in all other regions to provide sustainable digital solutions for our partners. Additional work aspects: strategic contribution to IT architecture and cross-process digitalization efforts, interact with connectivity solutions by supporting API, micro services, generative AI and other industries relevant technical developments. The business processes in scope of this role are: Purchase-to-Pay Job Requirements Focus on the minimum requirements to carry out the work – you might want to point out “additional plus/nice to have skills” that are not mandatory Edu c a t i o n Master's degree in computer science, business or STEM major with 4-6 years of IT or related field experience OR Bachelor's degree in computer science, business or STEM major with 6-8 years of IT or related field experience OR Diploma or comparable training with 6+ years of professional experience in IT and/or business areas Work Experience Minimum 4 years related working experience Experiencing Agile way of working or agile implementation approach Work experience in an international company is a plus T e c hn i c a l & P r o f e ss i o n a l Knowledge (mandatory and nice to have) Our main requirements: Consult and support internal and external partners when dealing with complex processes and IT application questions. Good business knowledge in various application and process areas, esp. Purchase to Pay (Purchase Orders, Confirmations, Goods Receipts, Migo Movements, Invoices). Conducts and support the technical implementation of the B2B Integration to external partners Showing strong transactional experience in SAP R3 and/or S4/HANA (MM Procurement - SD ) Ability to work and navigate in SAP middleware platforms (PO, CPI Integration Suite) Provides a deep technical understanding of standard connectivity messages EDI-APIs and programming protocols (supporting e.g. iDocs , XML, EDIFACT, JSON, UI etc.) Consult and support IT analysis (process and/or data), mentoring, modelling , solution design and optimization of related business processes and models Execute studies in preliminary stages of projects, including evaluation of existing or new solutions Ability to support strategic planning and realization Can assume roles as project manager and related tasks Coordinate and execute prototyping, configuration and testing of solutions based on BASF requirements, while ensuring quality and security aspects Provide structured acceptance, analysis and description of solutions and/or concepts Support and/or steer the formulation of more complex costs estimates for efforts spend solution design, testing and implementation of business solutions Provides Business support and training (processes, tools, reports, etc.) where required Provide guidance and structure to enable day2day operational support incl , advising external support resources Extensive knowledge of standard connectivity messages, related business processes and applications Familiar with Azure DevOps (or GitHub or similar) Personal traits: You can demonstrate fluent communication skills in English (spoken and written) Well-developed sense of teamwork in an international team with strong interpersonal, written and verbal communication and conflict resolution skills. Business consulting skill with a focus on value generation Ambitious, proactive & entrepreneurial character Highly developed sense of responsibility High customer- and innovation-orientation Time flexibility to work across different time zones Nice-to-Have: Experiences as project manager Experiences in strategic planning and realization Experiences in AI Agents and AI based communication Certifications in Agile, SAP S/4 Language Proficiency Fluent spoken and written English proficiency Apply now A unique total offer: you@BASF At BASF you get more than just compensation. name: Deputy Manager - Engineering & Maintenance
description:
Deputy Manager - Engineering & Maintenance Job Details | BASF SE Skip to main content Find jobs Language Ceština (Ceská republika) Dansk (Danmark) Deutsch (Deutschland) Ελληνικά (Ελλάδα) English (United States) Español (España) Español (México) Français (France) Magyar (Magyarország) Italiano (Italia) 日本語 (日本) 한국어 (대한민국) Norsk bokmål ‎(Norwegian Bokmål) Nederlands (België / Nederland) Polski (Polska) Português (Brasil) Português (Portugal) Slovencina (Slovensko) Svenska (Konungariket Sverige) ภาษาไทย (ประเทศไทย) Türkçe (Türkiye) 简体中文 (中国大陆) 繁體中文(台灣) Employee Login Job Description Deputy Manager - Engineering & Maintenance LOCATION COMPANY JOB FIELD JOB TYPE JOB ID FLEXIBLE WORK OPTIONS LOCATION COMPANY JOB FIELD JOB TYPE JOB ID FLEXIBLE WORK OPTIONS Apply now O bjectives of the Position < Shift + Enter proceeds to the next line without bullet; Enter inserts new bullet> Lead, coordinate and monitor engineering projects and maintenance function as per the agreed norms under the direction of production head. Ensuring smooth functioning of production Paint & CED plant with minimum breakdowns by developing, implementing and sustaining best plant maintenance. To provide Maintenance services to Coatings Technology centre (CTC), ECR labs. Lead, coordinate and monitor the utility plant for its smooth functioning and supply the necessary utilities to production plants. Lead Safety at work. M ain Tasks Be responsible for ensuring compliance with respect to BASF’s license to operate in your area of responsibility(ies). Compliance, in accordance with the BASF Code of Conduct means adherence to: (1) applicable laws and regulations, (2) internal guidelines and policies, and (3) ethical business practices. You will keep the Managing Director informed of any and all matters concerning or impacting Compliance from time to time. To lead the engineering projects and maintenance team for all the maintenance and projects related activities. To Lead Site CAPEX, OPEX, MOC projects as project manager. To lead the operation of utilities for continuous supply of thermic fluid, nitrogen, compressed air, DM water etc. To develop, implement and sustain Preventive maintenance, predictive and breakdown maintenance of all equipment in the plant. To maintain the stock of critical spares of all the critical equipment. To prepare annual maintenance budget and ensuring expensed within the budget value. To develop & implement Annual maintenance budgeting and planning. To comply RC management system safety standards. Proper maintenance of all norms as per the departmental operating procedures of ISO 9001, IATF, ISO 14001 and RC requirements. To develop team’s individual development plan and trainings. Co-ordination with various departments like production, warehouse, laboratories, site engineering, procurement, controlling, HR etc. Developing vendors in coordination with procurement department. Developing and implementing quality management system for all the contractor fabrication works Overall reduction of maintenance expensed by following and implementing best maintenance practices. Adherence to the PPE usage of the plant personnel and work permit system is properly followed. M inimum Education and Qualification Required for the Position Edu c a t i o n: Bachelor of Engineering - Mechanical W o r k in g Experience : 10-15 years in Plant Maintenance, need to have experience of handling multi-disciplinary team of more than 12 people at least for 4-5 years. Technical & Professional Knowledge: Mechanical engineer by profession, need to have good safety and quality system knowledge, Basic knowledge on Civil, Electrical and instrumentation engineering, knowledge of Working with the creative multidisciplinary team. BPI is considered a strategic tool to digitalize processes and enable seamless exchange of data between applications, businesses, customers and partners in real-time. Describe the objectives of the role here (2 - 3 sentences only) In this role, you will focus on consulting representatives of BASF businesses and BASF partners on integrating business processes primarily in the Logistics/Transport process area, including respective mappings. Main Tasks / Scope of Work The Solution Consultant provides customized integration solutions for internal partners and external partners via EDI, API, Micro Services, AI Agents, and similar technologies. The Solution Consultant supports our inter nal (SAP ERP and Satellite Systems) and external partners to specify their requirements and translates those into best-in-class solution designs based on technical and business process knowledge, aligned with process design and architecture. The consultant will be responsible for supplemental tasks in the daily operation, e.g. operational support (2nd/3rd level), issue resolving, quality assurance, and business interaction. The role does also include assignments to support comprehensive business integration projects. The Solution Consultant works in a global, international setting, interacting with team members in all other regions to provide sustainable digital solutions for our partners. Additional work aspects: strategic contribution to IT architecture and cross-process digitalization efforts, interact with connectivity solutions by supporting API, micro services, generative AI and other industries relevant technical developments. The business processes in scope of this role are: Transport and Logistics, Warehousing Job Requirements Focus on the minimum requirements to carry out the work – you might want to point out “additional plus/nice to have skills” that are not mandatory Edu c a t i o n Master's degree in computer science, business or STEM major with 4-6 years of IT or related field experience OR Bachelor's degree in computer science, business or STEM major with 6-8 years of IT or related field experience OR Diploma or comparable training with 6+ years of professional experience in IT and/or business areas Work Experience Minimum 4 years related working experience Experiencing Agile way of working or agile implementation approach Work experience in an international company is a plus T e c hn i c a l & P r o f e ss i o n a l Knowledge (mandatory and nice to have) Our main requirements: Consult and support internal and external partners when dealing with complex processes and IT application questions . Good business knowledge in various application and process areas, esp. Logistics / transport management Conducts and support the technical implementation of the B2B Integration to external partners Showing strong transactional experience in SAP R3 and/or S4/HANA (TM, SD) Ability to work and navigate in SAP middleware platforms (PO, CPI Integration Suite) Provides a deep technical understanding of standard connectivity message s EDI-APIs and programming protocols (supporting e.g. iDocs , XML, EDIFACT, JSON, UI etc.) Consult and support IT analysis (process and/or data), mentoring, modelling , solution design and optimization of related business processes and models Execute studies in preliminary stages of projects, including evaluation of existing or new solutions Ability to support strategic planning and realization Can assume roles as project manager and related tasks Coordinate and execute prototyping, configuration and testing of solutions based on BASF requirements, while ensuring quality and security aspects Provide structured acceptance, analysis and description of solutions and/or concepts Support and/or steer the formulation of more complex costs estimates for efforts spend solution design, testing and implementation of business solutions Provides Business support and training (processes, tools, reports, etc.) where required Provide guidance and structure to enable day2day operational support incl , advising external support resources Extensive knowledge of standard connectivity messages, related business processes and applications Familiar with Azure DevOps (or GitHub or similar) Personal traits: You can demonstrate fluent communication skills in English (spoken and written) Well-developed sense of teamwork in an international team with strong interpersonal, written and verbal communication and conflict resolution skills. Business consulting skill with a focus on value generation Ambitious, proactive & entrepreneurial character Highly developed sense of responsibility High customer- and innovation-orientation Time flexibility to work across different time zones Nice to have: Experiences as project manager Experiences in strategic planning and realization Experiences in AI Agents and AI based communication Certifications in Agile, SAP S/4 Language Proficiency Fluent spoken and written English proficiency Apply now A unique total offer: you@BASF At BASF you get more than just compensation. BPI is considered a strategic tool to digitalize processes and enable seamless exchange of data between applications, businesses, customers and partners in real-time. Describe the objectives of the role here (2 - 3 sentences only) In this role, you will lead our global middleware solution development and operation (DevOps) team as a product owner. The team task  - in accordance with business requirements and enterprise architecture - to integrate BASF businesses with external partners, drive efficiencies, and drive BASF’s e-share. You ensure standardized, runnable, supportable, and stable solutions from a technical point of view. Main Tasks / Scope of Work Consulting tasks Guides the middleware DevOps team together with the product manager and product architect Create the Product Roadmap and align it with the organizational and internal Business Partner goals Tackle with the Product Manager product-related impediments to provide the best possible environment for the team to perform at its best. Consults the BPI team in technical application questions during the solution design and functional specification phase Provides effort estimation for realization and contributes to project planning Creates Technical Design Document supported by the Business Performs configuration and development in systems (e.g. customizing in SAP and / or KAFKA and SAP HANA DB, or in technology stack e.g. java) Manage development activities (internal and external resource planning for development) Supports testing and service transition Collaborates with support team to identify areas of process implementation issues /continuous improvement Translates stakeholder requirements into concrete specifications for different Integration technologies, like SAP CPI, Kafka, API-Management, use of technology stack using java Software engineering tasks: Focus is software design and software architecture of components and applications. Independent development, enhancement, and migration of applications / modules / interfaces / tools / communication solutions Integration and testing of software components within the existing application landscape. Quality assurance and documentation of software developments. Job Requirements Focus on the minimum requirements to carry out the work – you might want to point out “additional plus/nice to have skills” that are not mandatory Edu c a t i o n Master's degree in computer science or STEM major with 4 -6 years of IT or related field experience OR Bachelor's degree in computer science or STEM major with 6 - 8 years of IT or related field experience OR Diploma or comparable training with 6+ years of professional experience in IT/application development Work Experience Minimum 6 years related working experience , thereof 2 years as a digital product owner. Experiencing Agile way of working or agile implementation approach Work experience in an international company is a plus T e c hn i c a l & P r o f e ss i o n a l Knowledge (mandatory and nice to have) Our main requirements : Experience as a digital Product Owner Experience with integration tools like SAP CPI, Trading Partner Management, Integration Advisor Experience in different integration scenarios (orders, invoices, etc.) Familiar with Azure DevOps (or GitHub or similar) Experience in operating/supporting systems as 2nd or 3rd level support ( root cause analysis and provide solutions for production and development issues ) . Message monitoring to ensure solutions are performed as expected Document test plans and complete unit testing of developed object Participate in collaboration on break/fixes, enhancements, and projects Broad overview of integration technolog ies esp. regarding SAP Personal traits : You can demonstrate fluent communication skills in English (spoken and written) Well-developed sense of teamwork in an international DevOps team with strong interpersonal, written and verbal communication and conflict resolution skills. Business acumen with focus on business strategy, product management and cost/benefit management Technical consulting skill with a focus on architecture and standardization Ambitious, p roactive & entrepreneurial character Highly developed sense of self- responsibility High customer- and service- orient ation Time flexibility to work across different time zones Nice to have: Familiar with EDI , SAP IDOC Experience in any of the following SAP S/4 modules SD, MM or TM Familiar with Kafka publish-subscribe principles Experience in Kafka connectors and integration scenarios on different hyperscaler s Experience in t ransformation tools like KSQL Streams Experience in SAP SLT (or other ETL tool s ) Experience with API Management, SAP HANA DB Experiences in AI supported coding and coding of AI agents / AI based communication Experience in Cloud Big Data technologies and architectures within AZURE or AWS Experience in Java, Scala, Python, MySQL Familiar with event-driven microservices Certifications in agile , SAP, Hyperscalers Language Proficiency Fluent spoken and written English proficiency Apply now A unique total offer: you@BASF At BASF you get more than just compensation. You have also a growth mindset oriented to results and you are self-motivated • You need to understand specific processes for IM and WM and know the integration points with other SAP Modules (MM, SD, FI, CO, TM, PP, QM etc.) • You will design and develop UI components, process flow logic and architecture and build up automation pipelines • Stay updated in latest changes in Flutter, Android and iOS versions and of the integrated development environment • You can work in a structured way in order to prepare and support documentation, alignments, community meetings and decision-making processes Qualifications: • Required: Successfully completed studies in computer science, business informatics or a comparable qualification • Plus: Knowledge in Site Logistics operations • Plus: Knowledge of full stack tools (e.g. DevOps Azure) • Required: Frontend development (Flutter Framework, Dart, BLoC Pattern) • Plus: Development experience in general • Flutter Development • Azure Environment (Devops, Automation/Pipelines, Authentication) • Fluent (written and spoken) in English • Plus : MS SQL • OpenAPI 3.0 and RESTful API’s and how to integrate these in a Flutter application • Android and iOS native development What we offer: Be part of a global leader in digital transformation, working in a vibrant Digital Hub that values innovation, agility, and cross-functional collaboration. Shape the future of BASF’s digital landscape, contributing to projects that drive sustainability and make a real impact. Thrive in a high-performance culture that supports your personal and professional growth, offering diverse learning opportunities and career development. Enjoy a modern, inclusive work environment where your ideas are valued, and your curiosity and ambition are encouraged. Benefit from flexible working models, international networking, and a strong sense of purpose as we enable our customers’ green transformation and lead the way in digital excellence.
